lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship's passenger fit.

sources.label: Inara — Caspian Explorer
sources.what: Stock hull stats, optional-internal layout, and passenger-cabin module compatibility for this ship.

sources.label: Fandom — Caspian Explorer
sources.what: Manufacturer (Zorgon Peterson), Class-8 FSD integration, pad class and release history.

sources.label: Fandom — Passenger Cabin
sources.what: Economy/business/first/luxury cabin capacities and slot-size restrictions used to size the cabin suite.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Caspian Explorer ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.
